hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储主席凯文·沃什向参议院银行委员会作证对经济和利率造成打击；【FINANCE】纽约联储主席威廉姆斯表示通胀已见顶，利率“处于有利位置”；【CRYPTO】随着美国通胀将比特币价格推升至近 65,000 美元，两组比特币投资者纷纷抛售。

items.title: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's testimony to Senate banking committee hits on economy, interest rates
items.summary: As part of congressionally mandated Capitol Hill appearances for the central bank leader, Warsh spoke Tuesday to the House financial services committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什向参议院银行委员会作证对经济和利率造成打击
items.summary_zh: 作为国会授权央行行长出席国会山的一部分，沃什周二向众议院金融服务委员会发表讲话。

items.title: New York Fed President Williams says inflation has peaked, rates 'well positioned'
items.summary: Williams cited five reasons why he expects the latest price surge has run its course.
items.title_zh: 纽约联储主席威廉姆斯表示通胀已见顶，利率“处于有利位置”
items.summary_zh: 威廉姆斯列举了他预计最近的价格上涨已经结束的五个原因。

items.title: Two Groups of bitcoin Investors sell on the rise as U.S. inflation lifts prices to nearly $65,000
items.summary: Bitcoin surges toward $65,000 on softer-than-expected inflation data, but on-chain signals show two key investor groups selling into the bounce.
items.title_zh: 随着美国通胀将比特币价格推升至近 65,000 美元，两组比特币投资者纷纷抛售
items.summary_zh: 由于通胀数据弱于预期，比特币飙升至 65,000 美元，但链上信号显示两个主要投资者群体在反弹时抛售。

items.title: Buffett says Trump's pick of Kevin Warsh for Fed chair was 'good choice'
items.summary: Warren Buffett believes Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will do the best job he can.
items.title_zh: 巴菲特表示特朗普选择凯文·沃什担任美联储主席是“不错的选择”
items.summary_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特相信美联储主席凯文·沃什将尽其所能。

items.title: Argentina face action after waving Falklands banner
items.summary: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.
items.title_zh: 阿根廷挥舞福克兰群岛旗帜后面临行动
items.summary_zh: 阿根廷球员在世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰后举起横幅支持阿根廷对福克兰群岛的主权，因此他们可能面临国际足联的纪律处分。

items.title: A better way to turn 2D designs into 3D models for rapid prototyping
items.summary: Researchers developed an automated framework that helps AI models generate CAD programs more accurately and efficiently.
items.title_zh: 将 2D 设计转变为 3D 模型以进行快速原型设计的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一个自动化框架，帮助 AI 模型更准确、更高效地生成 CAD 程序。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Star analyst Dan Ives forms Yorkville Ives merchant bank after leaving Wedbush
items.summary: The new firm, Yorkville Ives & Co., will combine investment banking, equity research, institutional trading and principal investing.
items.title_zh: 明星分析师 Dan Ives 在离开 Wedbush 后组建了 Yorkville Ives 商业银行
items.summary_zh: 新公司Yorkville Ives & Co.将把投资银行、股票研究、机构交易和本金投资结合起来。

items.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran as Trump warns Tehran it 'better behave'
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says he is yet to decide whether or not he will "finish off" Iran.
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告德黑兰“表现得更好”，美国对伊朗发动新的打击
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他尚未决定是否“消灭”伊朗。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Exchange Strikes for 5th Straight Day
items.summary: Though both sides appeared to be digging in, a top Iranian official seemed to leave the door open for a deal, saying, “We must fear neither war nor negotiations.”
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国和伊朗连续第五天交锋
items.summary_zh: 尽管双方似乎都在坚持立场，但一名伊朗高级官员似乎为达成协议的大门敞开，他说：“我们既不必害怕战争，也不必害怕谈判。”

items.title: Strategy CEO says company isn’t going anywhere as bitcoin buyer, sees debt concerns only below $10,000 BTC
items.summary: Strategy would begin considering risks associated with its debt only if bitcoin falls to around $8,000-$10,000, CEO Phong Le said.
items.title_zh: Strategy首席执行官表示公司不会去任何地方作为比特币买家，认为债务问题仅低于10,000美元比特币
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官 Phong Le 表示，只有当比特币跌至 8,000-10,000 美元左右时，该战略才会开始考虑与债务相关的风险。

items.title: Benchmark says Securitize investors should ‘strip out the noise’ after post-SPAC selloff
items.summary: Separately, Securitize announced a partnership with Cantor Fitzgerald to support blockchain-based IPOs and secondary offerings.
items.title_zh: Benchmark表示，在SPAC抛售后，证券化投资者应该“排除噪音”
items.summary_zh: 另外，Securitize 宣布与 Cantor Fitzgerald 建立合作伙伴关系，以支持基于区块链的 IPO 和二次发行。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Anthropic moves closer to mega-IPO as bankers line up investor meetings
items.summary: Anthropic is lining up investor meetings ahead of a potential IPO as soon as October as the AI startup behind looks to beat rival OpenAI to the public markets.
items.title_zh: 银行家们纷纷召开投资者会议，Anthropic 距离大型 IPO 又近了一步
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 正准备在 10 月份潜在的 IPO 之前召开投资者会议，这家人工智能初创公司希望在公开市场上击败竞争对手 OpenAI。

items.title: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
items.summary: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特今天在市场上表示：“当每个人都喜欢赌博时，很难找到价值”
items.summary_zh: 这位投资者一直对股市持尖锐批评态度，他表示股市越来越多地被投机交易而非长期投资所定义。

items.title: Warren Buffett calls Bill Gates' actions with Epstein 'distasteful' but says people make mistakes
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman left out the Gates Foundation from his annual charitable stock gifts for the first time in 20 years.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称比尔·盖茨与爱泼斯坦的行为“令人厌恶”，但表示人都会犯错误
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔·哈撒韦公司董事长 20 年来首次将盖茨基金会排除在年度慈善股票捐赠之外。

items.title: Morgan Stanley posts record quarterly revenue and profit as equities trading surges 69%
items.summary: Like at peers Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase, a massive beat in equities trading drove the quarter's outsized results.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利季度营收和利润创历史新高，股票交易量飙升 69%
items.summary_zh: 与同行高盛和摩根大通一样，股票交易的大幅增长推动了本季度的巨额业绩。

items.title: The AI boom just found two new winners: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase
items.summary: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan showed that Wall Street is a major beneficiary of the AI boom, with record revenue driven by surging trading and investment banking.
items.title_zh: 人工智能热潮刚刚找到了两个新的赢家：高盛和摩根大通
items.summary_zh: 高盛和摩根大通表明，华尔街是人工智能热潮的主要受益者，交易和投资银行业务的激增推动了创纪录的收入。

items.title: US military to start screening for testosterone deficiency, Hegseth says
items.summary: Hegseth says he is authorising hormone screening to ensure US troops "operate at your absolute best".
items.title_zh: 赫格斯说，美国军方将开始筛查睾酮缺乏症
items.summary_zh: 赫格斯表示，他正在授权进行激素筛查，以确保美军“以绝对最佳状态作战”。

items.title: Ukraine Pounds Russian Ships in Its Campaign to Cut Off Crimea
items.summary: After striking roads and railways, Kyiv is now focusing on sea routes as it tries to disrupt fuel supplies and pressure Russia to end the war.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰在切断克里米亚的行动中猛烈攻击俄罗斯船只
items.summary_zh: 在袭击公路和铁路之后，基辅现在将重点放在海上航线上，试图中断燃料供应并向俄罗斯施压以结束战争。

items.title: For Argentina, a World Cup Semifinal Against England Isn’t Just Soccer
items.summary: Wednesday’s contest for a spot in the final carries the weight of a 1986 contentious clash, a war over the Falklands and a national mythology built around Diego Maradona.
items.title_zh: 对于阿根廷来说，世界杯半决赛对阵英格兰不仅仅是足球
items.summary_zh: 周三的决赛席位之争承载着 1986 年一场有争议的冲突、福克兰群岛战争以及围绕迭戈·马拉多纳建立的国家神话的分量。

items.title: For Israel, the U.S.-Iran Hostilities Have Created an Uneasy Limbo
items.summary: Officials see a return to full-blown war as preferable to an agreement that fails to curb the threats Iran poses to Israel. Meanwhile, they wait.
items.title_zh: 对于以色列来说，美国与伊朗的敌对行动造成了不安的困境
items.summary_zh: 官员们认为，与无法遏制伊朗对以色列构成威胁的协议相比，恢复全面战争更为可取。与此同时，他们等待。

items.title: Coinbase's Jesse Pollak steps back from Base app leadership after admitting his crypto social strategy failed
items.summary: Pollak said that Jordan Fish, also known on X as 'Cobie,' will lead the Base app team.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的 Jesse Pollak 在承认其加密社交策略失败后退出 Base 应用程序领导地位
items.summary_zh: Pollak 表示，Jordan Fish（在 X 上也被称为“Cobie”）将领导 Base 应用程序团队。

items.title: Cantor and Securitize collaborate on blockchain-based IPOs
items.summary: The move creates a pathway for public companies to raise capital onchain and issue tokenized securities.
items.title_zh: Cantor 和 Securitize 合作开展基于区块链的 IPO
items.summary_zh: 此举为上市公司在链上筹集资金和发行代币化证券创造了一条途径。

items.title: Ostium suffers $18 million exploit as oracle attack wave continues to hit DeFi
items.summary: A hacker used Ostium's own price-reporting infrastructure against the protocol, submitting falsified future-dated oracle data to manufacture fake trading profits and trigger an $18 million payout.
items.title_zh: 预言机攻击浪潮持续冲击 DeFi，Ostium 遭受 1800 万美元的攻击
items.summary_zh: 一名黑客利用 Ostium 自己的价格报告基础设施来违反该协议，提交伪造的未来预言机数据来制造虚假交易利润并触发 1800 万美元的支付。

items.title: From Perpetual Swaps to Perpetual CFDs: The Regulated Evolution
items.summary: The 24/7 Trading Imperative Fixed exchange sessions are a structural mismatch with the global retail base. The NYSE opens at 9:30 a.m. Eastern and closes at 4:00 p.m., a window designed for an era when the participant base was concentrated in a single geography and order flow was
items.title_zh: 从永续掉期到永续差价合约：受监管的演变
items.summary_zh: 24/7 交易势在必行的固定交易时段与全球零售基础存在结构性不匹配。纽约证券交易所于东部时间上午 9:30 开盘，下午 4:00 收盘，这个窗口是为参与者基础集中在单一地域且订单流被限制的时代而设计的。

items.title: Stripe-PayPal deal could accelerate shift to blockchain-based money, Polygon exec says
items.summary: "Within the next few years the majority of money will live and move on blockchain in one form or another," according to Polygon Labs.
items.title_zh: Polygon 高管表示，Stripe-PayPal 交易可能会加速向基于区块链的货币的转变
items.summary_zh: Polygon Labs 表示：“在未来几年内，大部分资金将以一种或另一种形式在区块链上存在和流动。”

items.title: BlackRock outlines vision for crypto-TradFi convergence as product pipeline grows
items.summary: The firm seeks to offer tokenized long-term investments like "Treasury funds, iShares ETFs, and even private markets."
items.title_zh: 随着产品管道的增长，贝莱德概述了加密货币与 TradFi 融合的愿景
items.summary_zh: 该公司寻求提供代币化的长期投资，如“国库基金、iShares ETF，甚至私人市场”。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #872.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Akedo (AKE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#872。

items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：现金猫（CASHCAT）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 282 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #118.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 118 位。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #342.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#342。

items.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
items.summary: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.
items.title_zh: 美国正在通过州和联邦行动推进人工智能安全
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 概述了人工智能治理的“反向联邦制”方法，其中州法律帮助建立安全、民主人工智能的国家框架。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Helping AI models to meet the real world
items.summary: Through research and entrepreneurship, Professor Devavrat Shah is helping to design methods that can handle constant decision-making using limited computational resources.
items.title_zh: 帮助AI模型满足现实世界
items.summary_zh: 通过研究和创业，Devavrat Shah 教授正在帮助设计可以使用有限的计算资源处理持续决策的方法。

items.title: Australia to Impose Energy and Water Guardrails on Data Centers Amid A.I. Boom
items.summary: The country will also seek to protect the rights of creators of work used to train artificial intelligence models, as it aims to impose parameters on the growing industry.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚将在人工智能时代对数据中心实施能源和水护栏繁荣
items.summary_zh: 该国还将寻求保护用于训练人工智能模型的作品创作者的权利，因为它的目的是对不断发展的行业施加参数。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.6 现在是 Microsoft 365 Copilot 中的首选模型
items.summary_zh: 了解 GPT-5.6 如何为 Microsoft 365 Copilot 提供更强大的跨 Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Chat 和 Cowork 的 AI 功能，从而实现更快、更高质量的工作。

items.title: Model Routing Is Simple. Until It Isn’t.
items.title_zh: 模型路由很简单。直到它不是。

items.title: Native-speed vLLM transformers modeling backend
items.title_zh: 本机速度 vLLM 变压器建模后端

items.title: Hugging Face Models on Foundry Managed Compute
items.title_zh: Foundry 托管计算上的拥抱脸部模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 2026 年 6 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 6 月起最新的 AI 更新。

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: ‘Arsenal of democracy’: Jamie Dimon announces $24 million effort to boost American shipbuilding
items.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon unveiled a $24 million package to bolster American shipbuilding, funding a new submarine facility at the Philadelphia Navy Yard.
items.title_zh: “民主武器库”：杰米戴蒙宣布投入 2400 万美元促进美国造船业
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 公布了一项 2400 万美元的计划，以支持美国造船业，为费城海军造船厂的新潜艇设施提供资金。

items.title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
items.summary: A large section of the giant Morandi motorway bridge crumbled and collapsed on to the railway tracks below.
items.title_zh: 热那亚大桥灾难 43 名遇难者家属等待判决
items.summary_zh: 巨大的莫兰迪高速公路桥的很大一部分崩塌并倒塌到下面的铁轨上。

items.title: More people around the world now favour China over the US, Pew study suggests
items.summary: There is more confidence in Xi Jinping than Donald Trump, the US think tank's survey indicates.
items.title_zh: 皮尤研究中心显示，现在世界上越来越多的人支持中国而不是美国
items.summary_zh: 美国智库的调查显示，人们对习近平的信心比对唐纳德·特朗普的信心更高。

items.title: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DR Congo forest
items.summary: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国森林中发现“隐藏”的橙色嘴唇新猴种
items.summary_zh: 科学家们形容，看到一种很少有人知道其存在的动物的脸时会有“奇妙的感觉”。

items.title: French MPs approve assisted dying law with strict rules after years of argument
items.summary: The bill would allow assisted dying for terminally ill adults who meet strict criteria.
items.title_zh: 经过多年争论，法国国会议员批准了有严格规定的安乐死法
items.summary_zh: 该法案将允许符合严格标准的绝症成年人接受辅助死亡。

items.title: Russian attacks kill 14 as Ukraine hits Black Sea oil tankers
items.summary: Civilian casualties are reported in a number of Ukrainian regions, while Kyiv hits 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰袭击黑海油轮 俄罗斯袭击造成14人死亡
items.summary_zh: 据报道，乌克兰多个地区有平民伤亡，而基辅则在黑海击中了 20 艘俄罗斯船只。

items.title: Special police team to investigate killing of an anti-migrant leader in South Africa
items.summary: The March and March provincial leader died of his injuries in hospital several days after being shot.
items.title_zh: 特别警察小组调查南非一名反移民领导人被杀事件
items.summary_zh: 这位马奇和马奇省领导人在中弹几天后在医院因伤重不治身亡。

items.title: Five arrested after Hong Kong police raid independent bookshops
items.summary: Officials say they are suspected of selling "seditious" books which incited "hatred" against authorities.
items.title_zh: 香港警方突击搜查独立书店后五人被捕
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，他们涉嫌出售煽动对当局“仇恨”的“煽动性”书籍。

items.title: He Has a $25 Million Bounty on His Head but Is Also a U.S. Partner in Venezuela
items.summary: A list of alleged crimes has not prevented Diosdado Cabello, and other Venezuelan officials, from working with a U.S. government that once hounded them.
items.title_zh: 他的人头被悬赏2500万美元，但他也是美国在委内瑞拉的合作伙伴
items.summary_zh: 一系列涉嫌犯罪行为并没有阻止迪奥斯达多·卡贝洛和其他委内瑞拉官员与曾经追捕他们的美国政府合作。

items.title: France Votes to Allow Assisted Dying
items.summary: Lawmakers approved a bill that will allow doctors to help terminally ill patients to die, adding France to a short list of nations that allow the practice.
items.title_zh: 法国投票允许辅助死亡
items.summary_zh: 立法者批准了一项允许医生帮助绝症患者死亡的法案，将法国列入允许这种做法的国家名单中。

items.title: Wildfires Rage in Ontario as Smoke Affects Toronto’s Air Quality
items.summary: Air quality in Canada’s largest city was at times the worst in the world on Wednesday, as wildfires across Ontario sent smoke drifting into New York City and beyond.
items.title_zh: 安大略省野火肆虐，烟雾影响多伦多空气质量
items.summary_zh: 周三，加拿大最大城市的空气质量有时是世界上最差的，安大略省的野火将烟雾飘入纽约市及其他地区。

items.title: As Argentina Tries to Win the World Cup, the Rest of Latin America Cheers Against It
items.summary: Rather than rally behind the tournament’s last Latin American team, other countries in the region are confronting Argentina’s fraught claims to its own identity.
items.title_zh: 当阿根廷试图赢得世界杯时，拉丁美洲其他国家却欢呼反对
items.summary_zh: 该地区的其他国家并没有团结起来支持本届世界杯的最后一支拉丁美洲球队，而是面对阿根廷对自己身份的令人担忧的主张。

items.title: U.S. Presses China to Free American Seismologist Accused of Spying
items.summary: President Trump has urged Xi Jinping to release the scientist, Youlin Chen, the man’s family says. Dr. Chen studied the detection of North Korean nuclear tests.
items.title_zh: 美国施压中国释放被指控从事间谍活动的美国地震学家
items.summary_zh: 陈友林的家人称，特朗普总统已敦促习近平释放陈友林。陈博士研究了朝鲜核试验的检测。

items.title: DTCC moves tokenized securities into live trading, marking a milestone for Wall Street's blockchain push
items.summary: DTCC's first live production trades using tokenized securities show how blockchain could reshape the infrastructure behind Wall Street.
items.title_zh: DTCC 将代币化证券引入实时交易，标志着华尔街区块链推动的里程碑
items.summary_zh: DTCC 首次使用代币化证券进行现场生产交易，展示了区块链如何重塑华尔街背后的基础设施。

items.title: The privacy paradox of protecting kids online
items.summary: We don’t need to imagine the privacy pitfalls of age verification. They’ve been happening for years, argues Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard.
items.title_zh: 保护在线儿童的隐私悖论
items.summary_zh: 我们不需要想象年龄验证的隐私陷阱。卡尔达诺基金会首席执行官 Frederik Gregaard 表示，这种情况已经发生多年了。

items.title: Crypto Long & Short: To ETH or not to ETH — is SOL the better diversifier?
items.summary: In this week's, Morgan Stanley’s Denny Galindo writes that as the crypto market expands, solana has historically been a better portfolio diversifier than ether, despite being more volatile.
items.title_zh: 加密多头和空头：选择 ETH 还是不选择 ETH — SOL 是更好的多元化工具吗？
items.summary_zh: 在本周的文章中，摩根士丹利的丹尼·加林多 (Denny Galindo) 写道，随着加密货币市场的扩张，尽管波动性更大，但 solana 历来是比以太币更好的投资组合多元化工具。

items.title: President Trump expected to meet with senators to work on ethics concerns in crypto bill
items.summary: The most contentious piece of the crypto market structure bill is unresolved in the final weeks of Senate runway, and the president is expected to discuss it.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统预计将与参议员会面，讨论加密货币法案中的道德问题
items.summary_zh: 加密市场结构法案中最具争议的部分在参议院最后几周仍未得到解决，预计总统将对此进行讨论。

items.title: South Korea to modify 76-year-old law to classify cryptocurrencies as national assets
items.summary: The government also reaffirmed plans to pilot tokenized government bonds next year and explore tokenizing state-owned real estate.
items.title_zh: 韩国将修改已有 76 年历史的法律，将加密货币归类为国家资产
items.summary_zh: 政府还重申计划明年试行代币化政府债券，并探索国有房地产代币化。

items.title: Open USD poses biggest threat yet to Circle's USDC, CoinShares says
items.summary: The consortium-backed stablecoin would share reserve income with partners instead of the issuer, pressuring Circle's margins if it debuts in 2026.
items.title_zh: CoinShares 表示，开放美元对 Circle 的 USDC 构成最大威胁
items.summary_zh: 这种由财团支持的稳定币将与合作伙伴而不是发行人分享储备收入，如果它在 2026 年推出，就会给 Circle 的利润带来压力。

items.title: California pair charged with laundering crypto proceeds from darknet fentanyl sales
items.summary: The pair allegedly shipped over 500 drug parcels over a seven-month period and laundered hundreds of thousands of dollars through crypto.
items.title_zh: 加州两人被控洗钱暗网芬太尼销售的加密收益
items.summary_zh: 据称，两人在 7 个月内运送了 500 多个毒品包裹，并通过加密货币洗钱数十万美元。

items.title: Public Hyperliquid treasury firm Hyperion enters into new 500k HYPE bond agreement with Skew
items.summary: Hyperion will deploy 500,000 tokens to Skew through a HYPE Asset Use Service (HAUS) agreement in exchange for equity and revenue share.
items.title_zh: 公共 Hyperliquid 财务公司 Hyperion 与 Skew 签订新的 50 万 HYPE 债券协议
items.summary_zh: Hyperion 将通过 HYPE 资产使用服务 (HAUS) 协议向 Skew 部署 500,000 枚代币，以换取股权和收入分成。

items.title: ‘Hugely positive’ meeting on Thursday with Trump to discuss ethics raises hopes for passage of sweeping crypto legislation
items.summary: Ethics will be front and center Thursday at a meeting with President Donald Trump, a small group of lawmakers and White House staff.
items.title_zh: 周四与特朗普讨论道德问题的“非常积极”的会议增加了通过全面加密立法的希望
items.summary_zh: 周四，在与唐纳德·特朗普总统、一小群立法者和白宫工作人员的会议上，道德问题将成为焦点。

items.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak hands Base app leadership to Cobie after admitting social bets fell short
items.summary: Coinbase executive Jesse Pollak will focus on Base blockchain's infrastructure, prioritizing trading, stablecoin payments, and AI agents.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 的杰西·波拉克 (Jesse Pollak) 在承认社交投资失败后，将 Base 应用程序的领导权交给了 Cobie
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 高管 Jesse Pollak 将专注于 Base 区块链的基础设施，优先考虑交易、稳定币支付和人工智能代理。

items.title: Crypto clearinghouse Glacis Labs raises $6.8 million seed to expand ZeroDelta platform
items.summary: Glacis aims to expand ZeroDelta, its multichain clearing platform for stablecoins, into tokenized securities and foreign exchange over time.

items.summary_zh: Glacis 的目标是随着时间的推移将其稳定币多链清算平台 ZeroDelta 扩展到代币化证券和外汇领域。

items.title: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
items.summary: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

items.summary: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

items.summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

items.summary: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini API 中扩展托管代理：后台任务、远程 MCP 等

items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。

items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 3 Questions: Neural transparency and the future of AI design
